message:
fix(core): alt-screen detection, recording redaction, and test config defaults

ingest.rs:
- Fix is_alt_screen() to return None when no authoritative status update
  (last_status_at.is_none()), avoiding false override of text-based
  alt-screen detection in the capture pipeline

recording.rs:
- Refactor record_segment to avoid double allocation: only convert to bytes
  once based on redact_output flag
- Use segment.content.len() directly for bytes_raw accounting
- Update tests to use 56-char realistic secrets that match redaction patterns

config.rs / webhook.rs:
- Add email field (EmailNotifyConfig::default()) to NotificationConfig
  construction in tests to match updated struct definition

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
